import { useModal } from '../../context/landing/ModalContext' import { useScrollReveal } from '../../hooks/useScrollReveal' const PLANS = [ { name: 'Starter', amount: '0', period: 'Free forever', featured: false, features: [ { text: '3 job posts / month', included: true }, { text: 'Basic geo matching', included: true }, { text: 'In-app notifications', included: true }, { text: '3 home assets', included: true }, { text: 'Priority matching', included: false }, { text: 'Email reminders', included: false }, ], btnLabel: 'Get started free', btnVariant: 'outline', }, { name: 'Pro', amount: '499', period: 'per month', featured: true, badge: 'Most popular', features: [ { text: 'Unlimited job posts', included: true }, { text: 'Priority matching (top 5)', included: true }, { text: 'Real-time tracking', included: true }, { text: 'Unlimited assets', included: true }, { text: 'Email reminders', included: true }, { text: 'Photo documentation', included: true }, ], btnLabel: 'Start Pro plan', btnVariant: 'primary', }, { name: 'Technician', amount: '299', period: 'per month', featured: false, features: [ { text: 'Profile + verification', included: true }, { text: 'Smart job matching', included: true }, { text: 'Trust score dashboard', included: true }, { text: 'Earnings tracker', included: true }, { text: 'Schedule optimizer', included: true }, { text: 'Priority listing', included: true }, ], btnLabel: 'Join as technician', btnVariant: 'outline', }, ] export default function Pricing() { const { openModal } = useModal() const headerRef = useScrollReveal() const gridRef = useScrollReveal() return (
Pricing

}

  • {f.included ? '✓' : '✗'} {f.text}
    • ))}
))}
) }
